name: vaultnexus
description: Local-first Obsidian knowledge engine over MCP
long_description: VaultNexus indexes an Obsidian/Markdown vault into a hybrid retrieval graph (exact + semantic + wikilink) and exposes it to Claude via MCP. Runs entirely on your machine; the LLM reasoning lane optionally cites real notes back to you.

vault_path.title: Vault Path
vault_path.description: Path to your Obsidian or Markdown vault directory

chat_provider.title: Chat Provider (optional)
chat_provider.description: LLM provider for cited reasoning: 'anthropic', 'openai', or empty to disable. NOTE: user_config currently sets env on the bridge process only; the daemon (started out-of-band per docs/MCPB.md) must inherit the same env vars from your shell until auto-spawn lands.

chat_api_key.title: Chat API Key (optional)
chat_api_key.description: API key for the selected chat provider; leave empty to disable reasoning. NOTE: this is read by the daemon, not the bridge — export VAULTNEXUS_CHAT_KEY in the shell that starts the daemon.
